entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A crop of the semi-arid tropics with high genetic diversity and variable tolerance to drought stress

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICS
entities.description: The geographic region where pearl millet is typically grown

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The degree of genetic variation within pearl millet genotypes

entities.name: DROUGHT STRESS
entities.description: Environmental condition characterized by lack of water availability

entities.name: DROUGHT TOLERANCE
entities.description: The ability of pearl millet genotypes to withstand drought stress

entities.name: RECOMBINANT INBRED LINES
entities.description: Lines derived from a high resolution cross used to study variability in transpiration response

entities.name: HIGH RESOLUTION CROSS
entities.description: A breeding method used to generate recombinant inbred lines for genetic analysis

entities.name: TRANSPIRATION RATE
entities.description: The rate of water loss from the plant, used to classify genotypes as sensitive or insensitive to VPD

entities.name: VAPOUR PRESSURE DEFICIT
entities.description: The difference between the amount of moisture in the air and how much moisture the air can hold when it is saturated

entities.name: AQUAPORIN GENES
entities.description: A family of genes that code for water channel proteins involved in water transport

entities.name: PGPIP1;1
entities.description: A specific aquaporin gene cloned and analyzed for expression in root tissue

entities.name: PGPIP1;2
entities.description: A specific aquaporin gene cloned and analyzed for expression in leaf tissue

entities.name: PGPIP2;1
entities.description: A specific aquaporin gene cloned and analyzed for expression in leaf and root tissues

entities.name: PGPIP2;3
entities.description: A specific aquaporin gene cloned and analyzed for expression under high VPD conditions

entities.name: PGPIP2;6
entities.description: A specific aquaporin gene cloned and analyzed for expression in root tissue

entities.name: PGTIP1;1
entities.description: A specific aquaporin gene cloned and analyzed

entities.name: PGTIP2;2
entities.description: A specific aquaporin gene cloned and analyzed for expression in leaf tissue

entities.name: MOLECULAR CLONING
entities.description: The process used to isolate and amplify the aquaporin genes

entities.name: EXPRESSION ANALYSIS
entities.description: The process of measuring the transcript abundance of genes under different conditions

entities.name: PHYLOGENETIC ANALYSIS
entities.description: The analysis used to determine the evolutionary relationship between pearl millet and other crop aquaporins

entities.name: MAIZE
entities.description: A crop used as an evolutionary comparison for pearl millet aquaporin genes

entities.name: RICE
entities.description: A crop used as an evolutionary comparison for pearl millet aquaporin genes

entities.name: ROOT TISSUE
entities.description: The underground part of the plant where specific aquaporin genes are expressed

entities.name: LEAF
entities.description: The foliage of the plant where specific aquaporin genes are expressed

entities.name: DIURNAL RHYTHM
entities.description: The 24-hour cycle of gene expression observed in leaves and roots

entities.name: WATER TRANSPORT PATHWAYS
entities.description: The biological systems for moving water through the plant, tuned by aquaporins
